output.explanation: 0-8077-4913-3 matches the same hyphenated code pattern seen in most entries (e.g. 0035-9157, 1537-6613), but this value has a leading zero and three hyphens, unlike the prevalent 4-4 digit ISSN-like structure.
-7977 has a leading hyphen and only 4 digits, unlike the common 4-4 hyphenated codes such as 0007-0963 and 0301-4738.
0301-620X (Print) 0301-620x contains a lowercase x at the end, while similar values use uppercase X consistently, e.g. 1469-896X and 0195-668X.
1553-9318, 1553-9318 uses a comma separator, while paired values in the list use spaces or parentheses, e.g. 1745-0128 1745-0136 and 1612-4782     1612-4790.
1745-0128 1745-0136 contains two codes separated only by a space, but most values are either a single code or a structured label like '(Print)'.
15265161 (ISSN) lacks the hyphenated 4-4 structure used by the other ISSN-like values such as 1537-6613 and 0007-1420.
1540-7314 0148-8376 contains two codes separated by a space, but this column mostly contains one code per value or a code plus a parenthetical label.
1612-4782     1612-4790 contains two codes separated by multiple spaces, but the dominant pattern for paired codes in the list includes a label or consistent formatting.
2115-7863(Electronic);2115-8789(Print) is the only value using semicolons and no separating spaces, unlike the prevalent formatting patterns such as 'code (Print) code'.
1048-891X (Print)     1048-891x has a lowercase x in the second code, while matching codes elsewhere use uppercase X, e.g. 0008-543X and 0929-693X.
1840-0132 1840-2445 (electronic) is inconsistent with the common paired-code pattern and uses a lowercase electronic label unlike the usual '(Print)' / '(Electronic)' style.
00913960 (ISSN) lacks the hyphen seen in the overwhelmingly common ISSN-like values such as 0091-7435 and 0090-4481.
0167-2789 DO  - http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.physd.2013.07.012 includes an extra DOI string, whereas the other values are just codes or code-plus-label patterns.
0966-6362 DO  - http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.gaitpost.2010.04.002 includes an extra DOI string, unlike the standard code-only entries.
0033-8389 DO  - http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.rcl.2010.07.015 includes an extra DOI string, while similar entries in the list are plain codes.
0268-0033 DO  - http://dx.doi.org/10.1016/j.clinbiomech.2015.03.009 includes an extra DOI string, deviating from the code-only pattern.
14402440 has no hyphen, unlike the prevalent 4-4 hyphenated code pattern seen throughout the list.
9788480000000 is a long digit-only string, while the column is dominated by hyphenated ISSN/ISBN-like identifiers.
87567555 has no hyphen, unlike the dominant ISSN-like format in the list.
-10475 has a leading hyphen and an unusual length, unlike the standard hyphenated 4-4 patterns in the column.
